Use for ADR/Plan documentation changes that do NOT modify code behavior.
If code behavior changes alongside the docs, use the default template instead.
-->

## Documents Changed

- `docs/adr/...`
- `docs/plans/...`

## Decision / Policy Change

- 

## Consistency Check

- [ ] Related ADRs agree
- [ ] Related Plans agree
- [ ] Code comments / Javadocs use the same terminology
- [ ] No implementation behavior is implied without a corresponding Plan

## Not Included

- 

## Verification

- [ ] Document links / paths checked
- [ ] No code behavior changed (`git diff --stat` shows only docs/)

## Review Focus

- [ ] Is this decision ADR-level or Plan-level?
- [ ] Are scope, risks, and non-goals explicit?
- [ ] Does this preserve the Plan lifecycle (in-progress → approved → done)?

## Squash Commit Message

```text
docs(scope): one-line summary

- bullet
```
